calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-14-2024 Off Calendar

Notice (Other)
Off Calendar Jun-26-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Galeto Brazilian Grill, Inc. and Defendant Eli Nascimento.

Dept.505; Judge: Anne Costin; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 9:19:06 a.m. and concluding at 9:24:13 a.m. (D505)

Helen Chang, Esq. representing Plaintiff Itria Ventures, LLC.
Defendant Galeto Brazilian Grill, Inc. and Defendant Eli Nascimento not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract filed December 8, 2023.
Proof of personal service as to Defendant Galeto Brazilian Grill, Inc. and Defendant Eli Nascimento on January 27, 2024.
Default entered as to Defendant Galeto Brazilian Grill, Inc. and Defendant Eli Nascimento on February 28, 2024.
Dismissal filed as to Defendants Does 1-50 inclusive on April 12, 2024.

Counsel apologizes to the court for the oversight of not requesting leave from the court to waive personal appearance of witness. Counsel orally requests the court leave to proceed by declaration and offers proof.
Good cause appearing, the Court grants counsel's request for waiver of personal appearance of witness.
The court reviews the declaration and exhibits with counsel.
The court admits exhibits filed as evidence.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS judgment and rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:

Damages $127,120.25
Interest $8,672.05
Attorney's Fees $8,427.50
Costs $1,015.13
Total Judgment $145,234.93

Proposed judgment is signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Continued To Sep-11-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
